snippet.title: "Bono & the Edge" invited to sing with street buskers in London.  Or are they tribute artists?
snippet.description:
Tribute/performance artists as Bono and The Edge from one of the greatest rock bands of all time, U2, Pavel Sfera as Bono and Steve Richards as The Edge.  Both official doubles for Bono and The Edge.
Steve as the Edge and I were walking to our client's in Camden town when we saw Serena Kaos once again busking. We saw her across town the day before and said hello. Loveliest lady and singing with just deep soulfulness it was blinding.  
We were passing by and heard With Or Without You performed. Wanted to have a listen on the sidelines and she asked me to come up. I didn't want to take away her thunder nor her light, but sang in the shadows.  It was her show.  
Do connect with her would you. She's amazing as a performer.


We are available to for personalized videos, personal appearances and live performance.  Please feel free to share this page and the links.  We both have worked officially as Bono and The Edge as their doubles. Enjoy your day and U2 on!

https://www.bonoandedge.com

https://www.cameo.com/theedgedouble

La fotografia di Chiara Ferragni, mano nella mano con l’amica Chiara Biasi, con scritto: «Ai migliori amici che saltano sul primo aereo insieme a te quando hai un’emergenza» faceva presagire che qualcosa era successo in casa Ferragnez. E infatti dopo poche ore inizia a circolare la notizia che Fedez sarebbe stato ricoverato d'urgenza in ospedale. Il rapper fa subito sapere ai fan cosa gli è successo, e condivide un post dove spiega del suo problema. Sono ricoverato a causa di due ulcere che mi hanno causato un’emorragia interna - scrive. Ma cosa è successo?
Giovedì è arrivato in ambulanza al pronto soccorso del Fatebenefratelli di Milano e dopo i primi accertamenti è stato ricoverato in una stanza della chirurgia, dove si trova tuttora. 
Quello che gli è successo non credo sia collegato in alcun modo alla sua malattia di base, per cui non sta facendo nessuna terapia, ed è una cosa che può accadere a qualsiasi persona», spiega il professore che fa parte del team di medici che ha operato Fedez la scorsa primavera.
Può esserci una maggiore fragilità legata all’intervento, Ed è possibile che sia legata all’assunzione di qualche farmaco.
Secondo i medici Fedez dovrebbe essere in osservazione per tre giorni e poi potrà tornare a casa.
E dopo una terapia c’è una guarigione entro sei settimane, aggiunge il medico. Nel frattempo ha due splendidi bambini che lo aspettano a casa.
Un augurio a Fedez.

snippet.title: If You Still Think UFOs Are Fake, Watch This (David Grusch Interview)
snippet.description:
David Grusch is a former 14-year high ranking intelligence officer who left government in early '23 to blow the whistle on UFO’s. In 2019, he was tasked by the National Geospatial Intelligence Agency and Pentagon to investigate UFO’s as part of the Unidentified Anomalous Phenomenon Task Force (or UAPTF). In that context, he slowly started to uncover a covert UFO reverse engineering program being concealed from the civilian government. In June of '23, he outed himself to the public. In July of '23, he testified before Congress. We sat down for hours and talked about the entire history of UFO's, UFO and Atomic secrecy, Presidents and their relationships to UFO's and the insane world of Anti-Gravity research.

snippet.title: UFOs over Paris 1999; The Leslie Kean Factor
snippet.description:
In 1999 a wave of UFO sightings flooded Paris. That year, a dossier was handed to investigative journalist Leslie Kean, where French pilots and generals described their UFO experiences on record. In 2017, Luis Elizondo picked Leslie to reveal the existence of AATIP.

The paranormal has been with us since the dawn of time, manifesting when fragments of other realities reveal themselves to us unexpectedly or by design. In the past it led to the creation of myths in a long gone mystical world involving spiritual beings, giants and half-gods interacting with humanity and influencing its path of evolution. It all seemed, from our human ancestors perspective, to manifest as magic and proof for the presence of deities. 

In the age of technology, the exploration of the unexplained has accelerated, as evidence mounts in support of the real existence of unidentified phenomena in the form of artifacts, sightings and encounters, with evidence collected as photos, videos, bodily injuries, and tangible objects. In addition to eye witness testimonies, data and credible accounts by military personnel, air traffic controllers, police, pilots, astronauts and other professionals, along with thousands of accounts from public experiencer; the scientific and methodical research analysis continues the produce mounting evidence, revealing the shocking narrative that homo sapiens has been living behind a veil, like insomniac children unaware of the real world, their beginnings, with other intelligences present, existing amongst us, in our solar system, throughout the galaxy and beyond.

Project Bluebook is a wake up invitation; to explore and discover; to become enlightened about the true world we live in, and to re-remember our past; that we are not alone: That our Earth, our history and our place in the universe is much more complex, older and richer than we ever imagined: That intelligent beings from other worlds, planets, times, dimensions and possible universes, as well as from right here and now, may have not just interacted with us, but been part of us, and our evolution, and that we are inexplicably also part of them, biologically as well as evolutionary. 

Nothing less than our existence and survival as a species, the preservation of our home planet, and the future of human civilization may depend on it. Project Bluebook offers the exploration and discovery of thoughts, ideas, conclusions and truths regarding unidentified phenomena leading humanity to a new world awaiting us, if we can take it.

snippet.title: The Alien Abduction of Betty Andreasson Luca
snippet.description:
Betty Andreasson Luca's abduction is both typical and extraordinary. She was repeatedly abducted from childhood on, but she always described her experience as religious. Inside alien spacecraft she described aliens walking with angelic beings and she even had an out of body experience during an alien abduction.

The paranormal has been with us since the dawn of time, manifesting when fragments of other realities reveal themselves to us unexpectedly or by design. In the past it led to the creation of myths in a long gone mystical world involving spiritual beings, giants and half-gods interacting with humanity and influencing its path of evolution. It all seemed, from our human ancestors perspective, to manifest as magic and proof for the presence of deities. 

In the age of technology, the exploration of the unexplained has accelerated, as evidence mounts in support of the real existence of unidentified phenomena in the form of artifacts, sightings and encounters, with evidence collected as photos, videos, bodily injuries, and tangible objects. In addition to eye witness testimonies, data and credible accounts by military personnel, air traffic controllers, police, pilots, astronauts and other professionals, along with thousands of accounts from public experiencer; the scientific and methodical research analysis continues the produce mounting evidence, revealing the shocking narrative that homo sapiens has been living behind a veil, like insomniac children unaware of the real world, their beginnings, with other intelligences present, existing amongst us, in our solar system, throughout the galaxy and beyond.

Project Bluebook is a wake up invitation; to explore and discover; to become enlightened about the true world we live in, and to re-remember our past; that we are not alone: That our Earth, our history and our place in the universe is much more complex, older and richer than we ever imagined: That intelligent beings from other worlds, planets, times, dimensions and possible universes, as well as from right here and now, may have not just interacted with us, but been part of us, and our evolution, and that we are inexplicably also part of them, biologically as well as evolutionary. 

Nothing less than our existence and survival as a species, the preservation of our home planet, and the future of human civilization may depend on it. Project Bluebook offers the exploration and discovery of thoughts, ideas, conclusions and truths regarding unidentified phenomena leading humanity to a new world awaiting us, if we can take it.

snippet.title: The UFO Evidence: What We Don't Know
snippet.description:
Credible tales of UFO sightings and encounters with Alien beings are beyond count, millions are likely to have experienced them. These accounts, and accompanying evidence leaves us with ample proof beyond doubt for the existence of intelligently controlled non-human made craft. They exist. What it means, is a whole other story.

The paranormal has been with us since the dawn of time, manifesting when fragments of other realities reveal themselves to us unexpectedly or by design. In the past it led to the creation of myths in a long gone mystical world involving spiritual beings, giants and half-gods interacting with humanity and influencing its path of evolution. It all seemed, from our human ancestors perspective, to manifest as magic and proof for the presence of deities. 

In the age of technology, the exploration of the unexplained has accelerated, as evidence mounts in support of the real existence of unidentified phenomena in the form of artifacts, sightings and encounters, with evidence collected as photos, videos, bodily injuries, and tangible objects. In addition to eye witness testimonies, data and credible accounts by military personnel, air traffic controllers, police, pilots, astronauts and other professionals, along with thousands of accounts from public experiencer; the scientific and methodical research analysis continues the produce mounting evidence, revealing the shocking narrative that homo sapiens has been living behind a veil, like insomniac children unaware of the real world, their beginnings, with other intelligences present, existing amongst us, in our solar system, throughout the galaxy and beyond.

Project Bluebook is a wake up invitation; to explore and discover; to become enlightened about the true world we live in, and to re-remember our past; that we are not alone: That our Earth, our history and our place in the universe is much more complex, older and richer than we ever imagined: That intelligent beings from other worlds, planets, times, dimensions and possible universes, as well as from right here and now, may have not just interacted with us, but been part of us, and our evolution, and that we are inexplicably also part of them, biologically as well as evolutionary. 

Nothing less than our existence and survival as a species, the preservation of our home planet, and the future of human civilization may depend on it. Project Bluebook offers the exploration and discovery of thoughts, ideas, conclusions and truths regarding unidentified phenomena leading humanity to a new world awaiting us, if we can take it.

localized.title: The Wilbert Smith UFO Files
localized.description:
Wilbert Smith, an electronics engineer in Canada's transport ministry, seems to have managed, on his own, to get the Canadian government to establish a UFO research program back in the 1950’s. Many of  its validations only came to light in the 1980’s.

The paranormal has been with us since the dawn of time, manifesting when fragments of other realities reveal themselves to us unexpectedly or by design. In the past it led to the creation of myths in a long gone mystical world involving spiritual beings, giants and half-gods interacting with humanity and influencing its path of evolution. It all seemed, from our human ancestors perspective, to manifest as magic and proof for the presence of deities. 

In the age of technology, the exploration of the unexplained has accelerated, as evidence mounts in support of the real existence of unidentified phenomena in the form of artifacts, sightings and encounters, with evidence collected as photos, videos, bodily injuries, and tangible objects. In addition to eye witness testimonies, data and credible accounts by military personnel, air traffic controllers, police, pilots, astronauts and other professionals, along with thousands of accounts from public experiencer; the scientific and methodical research analysis continues the produce mounting evidence, revealing the shocking narrative that homo sapiens has been living behind a veil, like insomniac children unaware of the real world, their beginnings, with other intelligences present, existing amongst us, in our solar system, throughout the galaxy and beyond.

Project Bluebook is a wake up invitation; to explore and discover; to become enlightened about the true world we live in, and to re-remember our past; that we are not alone: That our Earth, our history and our place in the universe is much more complex, older and richer than we ever imagined: That intelligent beings from other worlds, planets, times, dimensions and possible universes, as well as from right here and now, may have not just interacted with us, but been part of us, and our evolution, and that we are inexplicably also part of them, biologically as well as evolutionary. 

Nothing less than our existence and survival as a species, the preservation of our home planet, and the future of human civilization may depend on it. Project Bluebook offers the exploration and discovery of thoughts, ideas, conclusions and truths regarding unidentified phenomena leading humanity to a new world awaiting us, if we can take it.

snippet.title: Michael Jackson's Drummer Jonathan Moffett Performs "Billie Jean"
snippet.description:
Michael Jackson's "Billie Jean" is undoubtedly one of the most iconic songs of all time. It's a timeless classic that continues to inspire new generations of musicians and fans alike. The song's driving beat is undoubtedly one of its most memorable features.

From the very first notes of the song, Sugarfoot's drumming sets the tone. The iconic hi-hat pattern is executed flawlessly, giving the song its signature groove. Throughout the track, Sugarfoot's playing is tasteful and precise, never overpowering the other instruments but always driving the song forward.

Playing live with three kick drums is not an easy task, and it requires an incredible amount of skill and precision. Jonathan Moffett is a master of this technique, and he executes it flawlessly in his performance of "Billie Jean". Let's take a closer look at how he does it.

snippet.title: Don't be overconfident like this Against Efren Reyes!
snippet.description:
Do not get overconfident like this against Efren Reyes.Don't be proud on yourself when the game is not yet over.This is a Hill HIll match between Efren and NIck Varner of AMerica. Nick Varner made a ball on the break but unfortunately did not have a look on the 1-ball.So, the American player elected to do a push out. Efren can see the 1-ball from here, so ofcourse he has to do a defensive shot.HE did well, but he did not expect this shot from NIck Varner. It was pretty clear that he got lucky here but that was a good shot. Ang again the US OPEN champion with a really good kick shot. He now has an open table but he has to stay focused as the ball layout is a little bit tricky. UNTIL disaster came for the AMERICAN PLAYER. He missed the shot on the 7-ball and the HUMBLE Efren Reyes took over and won the match. SUBSCRIBE NOW.
